title: Finite Ring Table Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite ring bad distributivity and multiplicative-identity QF_BV/DRAT regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Two fixed two-element ring-table conflicts: exact finite replay computes a*(b+c)=1 versus (a*b)+(a*c)=0 for the bad distributivity row, and computes 1*1=0 where a claimed multiplicative identity requires 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite ring rows only when they add distinct fixed-width algebra-table solver pressure; keep ideal theory, Noetherian/PID/UFD structure, and quantified ring theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite ring tables as deterministic BV or finite-function formulas; the bad distributivity and bad multiplicative-identity rows now have checked QF_BV/DRAT artifacts.
Replay finite ring witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Continue adding checked proof/evidence routes for failed axiom and universal table claims.
Keep ideal theory, Noetherian/PID/UFD structure, and quantified ring theory marked Lean-horizon.
